svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/28.2.5 Chrome/138.0.7204.251 Electron/37.6.1 Safari/537.36" version="28.2.5" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="tr4oq-4R3-CSZz51jwvQ" name="page cache"> <mxGraphModel dx="695" dy="481" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1000" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-2" value="写入时" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="538" y="192" width="108" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-3" value="操作系统异步
批量刷盘" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="854" y="180" width="156" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-6" value="顺序写 PageCache
近似内存速度" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" parent="1" source="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-2" target="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-4" value="读取时" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="538" y="312" width="108" height="54" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-5" value="未命中则触发
缺页中断加载" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=none;rounded=1;shadow=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="854" y="300" width="156" height="78" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-7" value="热数据命中缓存
避免磁盘 I/O" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=0;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;" edge="1" parent="1" source="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-4" target="gubGngZVPINg1tKZhnA_-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
